title: Westlake Village Earth Day Festival
description: At the COS our booth,  we will be sharing culture sheets on orchid growing, membership info, a small display of blooming plants and will be glad to answer questions.
location: Westlake Village Community Park (31107 Thousand Oaks Blvd.)

title: Conejo Orchid Society Library Show & Sale
location: Newbury Park Library  (2331 Borchard Rd.  Newbury Park)
description:
Shop a wide variety of beautiful, affordable orchids—perfect for beginners! Also available: unique companion plants like tillandsias and succulents. Come early for the best selection!

Got questions? Bring them along—we love to talk orchids!

FREE ADMISSION   Cash or check only for plant sales
